data_notes: Green fees: weekday 1,900 / weekend 2,300 THB from multiple booking sites (golfasian, golfsavers, chiangmaigolfing). One older source (2017 promo) shows lower rates — using more recent booking-site consensus.
Caddie 300 THB, cart 600 THB — confirmed via multiple sources (golfasian, 1golf.eu).
GPS coordinates approximate; course is in Wiang Chai district ~15 km SW of Chiang Rai city.
Driving range confirmed on course website and golfasian.
